name: macOS Voice Messages
description: Transcribe voice messages and respond with voice using native macOS speech APIs via voicecli.
author: Andres Rovira

requirements.description: voicecli must be installed via Homebrew

voice.description: Voice identifier for TTS (run 'voicecli voices' to list available)

locale.description: BCP 47 locale for voice selection (e.g., en-US, es-GT). Used when no voice is specified. Run 'voicecli locales' to see supported locales.
